ab: ikay ki 2022 ka caili, kay swasihu yahubu mapelaela pathahukai ikay nibungsiyu ki kacalrisiya ku adulruwa drepele ahakai ku kacalrilrisiyana pwacase ku nagane.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: kiatubulruwaku ku maulainga papiya ki sihu kihahibici ku akipalrainga drepele ahakai ku kacalrilrisiyana pwacase pikai ki nibungsiyu ka yacengecenge ka sya Cemelresai.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Cemelresai。
en: I interviewed Cemelresai, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: mapapalrainginai lu ataibalriva aiuwaku liniyana kitububulru iniya.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: ikay ki takitububulruwaneli, papiya nakuwa ngipapelaela ku tatualadha ku naganeini, la iluku nakuwa pathingale ki wacekecekeleini, si cekeleini.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: kyatubulruwaku iniya asu kakeecengenga naubalrithilringa ki nagane miya, kay sakukakudhaa pwacase ki nagane malisi?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: amiyaikai nakuwa, asiluiyaa lu ahakai ku ciniyukukana pwacase kadruwa ka aimaka pacengecenge patakela ku pathaheva ki naganeini, ku druma ku umase yakaiyana ku 「車先生」 amiya, si mutaluvaivainga ku makalra ku matiyalrupi matipulrivale.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「車先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Che Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: kau Cemelresai amiyaikai, ku nyahakaiya ku kacalrilrisiyana pwacase ka nagane amani ku patengatenga ka naganenai. kay naganeli sapatuthingala ku takasumanemananenai, cucungulanenai, takaumawmasanenai, anatuma lahau takalra ku myanakuwa ka kacalrisiya la palraingi kyumau pasiyulri ku lanaganelini.
ch: Cemelresai說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Cemelresai said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
